EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Kerberos service on host {event_src.host} failed to issue a session ticket, which is requested from host {src.host}, for the account {subject.account.name} to access the service {logon_service}
The Kerberos service on host {event_src.host} issued a session ticket, which is requested from host {src.host}, for the account {subject.account.name} to access the service {logon_service}
